gt_sql: SELECT T2.Consumption FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Price / T1.Amount > 29.00 AND T1.ProductID = 5 AND T2.Date = '201208'
pred_sql:
SELECT y.Consumption
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE t.ProductID = 5 
  AND (t.Price / t.Amount) > 29.00
  AND y.Date = '201208'
question: For all the people who paid more than 29.00 per unit of product id No.5. Give their consumption status in the August of 2012.
